title: erigeron polymorphus var. acris
intro: Erigeron polymorphus var. acris, commonly known as the Mountain Fleabane, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae). It is known for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat colds, fever, and digestive problems, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Erigeron polymorphus var. acris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions.
